hero.description: I design and build websites, internal systems, and custom digital solutions. From presentation sites to complex business applications and process automation.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a <bold>software developer</bold> focused on web applications, business systems, and custom solutions. I work on projects where reliability, functionality, and real business value matter.
about.paragraph2: I have experience building <bold>internal systems</bold>, <bold>custom web applications</bold>, and <bold>process automation</bold>. I get the most satisfaction from projects that people actually use and that save businesses time.
about.paragraph3: I studied <bold>Applied Informatics</bold> at FEI STU in Bratislava and continuously learn and apply new technologies including <bold>AI</bold>, which today opens new possibilities for businesses and products.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.subtitle: A comprehensive toolkit built through years of learning, practicing, and real-world application

stribog.title: Stribog | SaaS Platform Development
stribog.description: SaaS platform that lets entrepreneurs run their entire business from one place - from invoices, payroll and orders to their own website and e-shop, without juggling multiple tools.
stribog.details: I worked across the full stack - from frontend and backend to a desktop application. The platform covers processes where financial and legal accuracy is critical. The desktop app works with files like a virtual drive - users open and edit them in any program, and changes sync back automatically.

instaview.title: Instaview | Recruitment Automation via AI
instaview.description: I designed and implemented the backend infrastructure for a revolutionary HR platform that fully automates first contact and candidate screening using artificial intelligence.
instaview.details: My role was to ensure the system could flawlessly handle hundreds of parallel AI calls in real time. Through performance optimization and a stability-focused architecture, I helped build a product that saves companies nearly half of their hiring costs and completely eliminates manual work in the initial hiring phase.

everlution.title: Everlution | Client Project Development & Maintenance
everlution.description: Management of three live client projects across different industries - software for social organizations, a social network for event discovery, and an e-shop for a winery.
everlution.details: Improved login, in-app payments, and event discovery based on GPS location. Simplified data exports for social organizations required for legislative reporting.

smsolar.title: SMSolar | Solar ROI Calculator
smsolar.description: A plugin for a solar panel retailer that instantly shows customers whether they qualify for a government subsidy covering up to 90% of installation costs.
smsolar.details: The calculator uses regional air quality data and cross-references it with the Zelená domácnostiam subsidy programme criteria. The customer enters their address and immediately knows how much they can get back from the state - without having to research the programme themselves.

scanditrack.title: ScandiTrack
scanditrack.description: Price tracker for IKEA products just by product URL.
scanditrack.details: Created a web application to track prices of IKEA products. After a user enters the URL, the IKEA product info displays. After entering an email and price threshold, the product is tracked with confirmation emails.

clipboardPdf.title: Clipboard PDF Text Changer
clipboardPdf.description: Automated solution for fixing special character encoding issues when copying text from PDF files.
clipboardPdf.details: Created an executable application that automatically corrects Slovak special characters, saving time and ensuring text readability.

ticktick.title: TickTick Chrome Extension
ticktick.description: Web extension that automatically adds university gym workout sessions to TickTick planning app.
ticktick.details: Integrates with TickTick API to streamline workout planning by automatically importing session times and dates.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's discuss your next project or just say hello. I'm always open to new opportunities and interesting conversations.

form.heading: Send me a message
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project or just say hello...

meeting.heading: Schedule a meeting
meeting.description: Prefer a direct conversation? Book a 45-minute meeting to discuss your project in detail.
